positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for barutin_cove_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    located_in(deception_island,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    located_in(barutin_cove,snow_island)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    snow_island != deception_island).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,antarctica) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    ~located_in(X1,X2) | ~located_in(X0,X1) | located_in(X0,X2)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    snow_island != greenwich_island).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    deception_island != antarctica).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    barutin_cove != antarctica).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    greenwich_island != antarctica).

cnf(u36,negated_conjecture,
    located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    barutin_cove != snow_island).

cnf(u41,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,deception_island) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,barutin_cove) | located_in(X0,snow_island)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    located_in(snow_island,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    greenwich_island != deception_island).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    located_in(barutin_cove,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    located_in(greenwich_island,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    barutin_cove != south_shetland_islands).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    snow_island != antarctica).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    antarctica != south_shetland_islands).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    located_in(antarctica,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    barutin_cove != deception_island).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    deception_island != south_shetland_islands).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,barutin_cove) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    ~located_in(X0,barutin_cove) | located_in(X0,antarctica)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    greenwich_island != south_shetland_islands).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,snow_island) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    barutin_cove != greenwich_island).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    snow_island != south_shetland_islands).

cnf(u40,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,greenwich_island) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define cove(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
